creator: pcmaster@osk3.3web.ne.jp
text:
This is the FreeBSD samba port for Japanese. 
  Can use Japanese to sharing name. SWAT is translated Japanese.
  

	Makefile
	files/README.FreeBSD
	files/md5
	files/samba.sh.sample
	files/smb.conf.default
	patches/patch-aa
	patches/patch-ab
	patches/patch-ac
	patches/patch-ad
	patches/patch-ae
	patches/patch-af
	patches/patch-ag
	patches/patch-ah
	patches/patch-ai
	pkg/COMMENT
	pkg/DESCR
	pkg/PLIST
